creator: raivo@lehma.com
text:
(In reply to Tijl Coosemans from comment #5)

The error message no longer appears.

# objdump -p /usr/local/lib/libgnutls.so | grep NEEDED
  NEEDED       libidn2.so.0
  NEEDED       libunistring.so.5
  NEEDED       libtasn1.so.6
  NEEDED       libnettle.so.8
  NEEDED       libhogweed.so.6
  NEEDED       libgmp.so.10
  NEEDED       libc.so.7
